title: soldanella pusilla subsp. pirinica
intro: Soldanella pusilla subsp. pirinica, also known as Pirin soldanella, is a subspecies of the Soldanella pusilla plant, which is a type of alpine flower native to the Pirin Mountains in Bulgaria. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Soldanella pusilla subsp. pirinica include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
